reviews.review_title: We need first aid apps, this isnt it
reviews.review_description: Too buggy unfortunately, I really wanted to like this. Even with a 9x9ft play area as not big enough to try 2 of the 3 levels. Two unplayable electric shock levels and a workshop heavy bleeding.  I love how we assess the scene for danger, and there are some really cool mechanics like looking closely at a wound and recruiting bystanders and moving around the scene that you do not see in other games. Great we put on our PPE before touching, that we did -sort of- treat for shock with the blanket....but super weird these were minecraft graphics no way you could assess, it was linear and strange instead of allowing for decision making. The voice acting was cute but this a free demo quality with questionable first aid not really training or in class demo material at all.
